    Serialized Form

    • Package view

      • Class view.AbstractView

        class AbstractView extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • observedData
            DataT extends AbstractData observedData
            The data object that this view is observing.
          • options
            OptionsMenu options
            Context or options menu associated with this view.
          • titleLabel
            JLabel titleLabel
            Label used to display a title or other brief textual information.

    • Package view.controls

      • Class view.controls.AbstractButton

        class AbstractButton extends JButton implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • action
            Runnable action
            The action to invoke when the button is clicked. May be null.

      • Class view.controls.AddButton

        class AddButton extends AbstractButton implements Serializable

      • Class view.controls.BackButton

        class BackButton extends AbstractButton implements Serializable

      • Class view.controls.EnumButton

        class EnumButton extends MenuButton implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • action
            Consumer<OptionT extends Enum<OptionT>> action
            The action to invoke when a value is selected.
          • enumType
            Class<OptionT extends Enum<OptionT>> enumType
            The enumeration class whose constants will populate the options menu.

      • Class view.controls.MenuButton

        class MenuButton extends AbstractButton implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • menu
            OptionsMenu menu
            The popup menu that will be displayed when this button is clicked.

      • Class view.controls.OptionsMenu

        class OptionsMenu extends JPopupMenu implements Serializable

    • Package view.dialogs

      • Class view.dialogs.AbstractDialog

        class AbstractDialog extends JDialog implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • cancelButton
            JButton cancelButton
            The "Cancel" button that closes the dialog without confirming.
          • confirmButton
            JButton confirmButton
            The "Confirm" button that commits the action associated with this dialog.
          • dataToWorkWith
            DataT extends AbstractData dataToWorkWith
            The data object that this dialog will manipulate.
          • wasConfirmed
            boolean wasConfirmed
            Flag indicating whether the user confirmed the dialog's action.

      • Class view.dialogs.AbstractTitleEditDialog

        class AbstractTitleEditDialog extends AbstractDialog<DataT extends AbstractData> implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • titleInputField
            JTextField titleInputField
            The editable text field for the data's title.

      • Class view.dialogs.ClearCollectionDialog

        class ClearCollectionDialog extends DeleteDataDialog<CollectionT extends AbstractCollection<DataT>> implements Serializable

      • Class view.dialogs.CreateChecklistDialog

        class CreateChecklistDialog extends AbstractTitleEditDialog<Checklist> implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • displayModeButtonGroup
            ButtonGroup displayModeButtonGroup
            The group of buttons for selecting the checklists display mode

      • Class view.dialogs.CreateTaskDialog

        class CreateTaskDialog extends EditTaskDialog implements Serializable

      • Class view.dialogs.DeleteDataDialog

        class DeleteDataDialog extends AbstractDialog<DataT extends AbstractData> implements Serializable

      • Class view.dialogs.EditTaskDialog

        class EditTaskDialog extends AbstractTitleEditDialog<Task> implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • deadlineLabel
            JLabel deadlineLabel
            Label for the deadline field, which may turn red if the deadline is invalid.
          • deadlineSpinner
            JSpinner deadlineSpinner
            Spinner allowing the user to select the task's deadline.
          • detailsInputArea
            JTextArea detailsInputArea
            Text area where the user can edit the task's details.
          • noDeadlineCheckBox
            JCheckBox noDeadlineCheckBox
            Checkbox allowing the user to indicate that the task has no deadline.
          • priorityButtonGroup
            ButtonGroup priorityButtonGroup
            Button group containing radio buttons for choosing the task's priority.

      • Class view.dialogs.RenameDataDialog

        class RenameDataDialog extends AbstractTitleEditDialog<DataT extends AbstractData> implements Serializable

    • Package view.pages

      • Class view.pages.AbstractCollectionPage

        class AbstractCollectionPage extends AbstractView<CollectionT extends AbstractCollection<DataT>> implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • bottomControlPanel
            JPanel bottomControlPanel
            The bottom control panel that can contain bottom action controls.
          • contentPanel
            JComponent contentPanel
            The content area that contains panels for each data item.
          • dataPanels
            ArrayList<AbstractDataPanel<DataT extends AbstractData>> dataPanels
            The list of data panels displayed inside the content area.
          • headerControlPanel
            JPanel headerControlPanel
            The top control panel that can contain header controls like a title label or buttons.

      • Class view.pages.ChecklistPage

        class ChecklistPage extends AbstractCollectionPage<Checklist, Task> implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • controller
            IChecklistPageListener controller
            Controller that handles user actions on this page.
          • sortMode
            TaskSorter.Mode sortMode
            The current sort mode for ordering displayed tasks.

      • Class view.pages.WorkspacePage

        class WorkspacePage extends AbstractCollectionPage<Workspace, Checklist> implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • controller
            IWorkspacePageListener controller
            The controller that handles user interactions for the workspace page

    • Package view.panels

      • Class view.panels.AbstractDataPanel

        class AbstractDataPanel extends AbstractView<DataT extends AbstractData> implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • controller
            IDataPanelListener<DataT extends AbstractData> controller
            The controller that handles user actions such as edit, delete, and selection events.

      • Class view.panels.ChecklistPanel

        class ChecklistPanel extends AbstractDataPanel<Checklist> implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • completionLabel
            JLabel completionLabel
            Label that displays the completion status of the checklist (e.g. number of unfinished tasks, empty, all tasks finished).

      • Class view.panels.TaskCardPanel

        class TaskCardPanel extends AbstractDataPanel<Task> implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • deadlineLabel
            JLabel deadlineLabel
            A label showing the task's deadline status, or "finished" if completed.
          • detailsLabel
            JLabel detailsLabel
            A label showing the task's optional details (description), if provided.
          • isDoneLabel
            JLabel isDoneLabel
            A label showing a checkbox or checkmark to indicate the task's completion status.
          • priorityBanner
            JPanel priorityBanner
            A visual banner that is color-coded to reflect the priority level of the task.

      • Class view.panels.TaskTextPanel

        class TaskTextPanel extends AbstractDataPanel<Task> implements Serializable
